title: Improving cell type identification with Gaussian noise-augmented single-cell RNA-seq contrastive learning
author: Alsaggaf, Ibrahim
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The benchmark datasets used to evaluate Gaussian noise augmentation-based scRNA-seq contrastive learning (GsRCL) against scRNA-seq cell-type identification tasks.
steps_raw: The benchmark datasets used to evaluate Gaussian noise augmentation-based scRNA-seq contrastive learning (GsRCL) against scRNA-seq cell-type identification tasks.
